_comment: Performance optimization profiles for desktop/workstation systems
name: Performance desktop profile
description: High-performance tuning for desktop/workstation. Optimizes power plan, services, and visual effects.

actions._comment: Set power plan to High Performance for maximum CPU/GPU performance
Enable SysMain (Superfetch) for faster application startup
Disable DiagTrack (Connected User Experiences and Telemetry) to reduce background activity
Set SystemResponsiveness to 0 (maximum responsiveness, may increase CPU usage)
actions.name: SystemResponsiveness

actions._comment: Set visual effects to 'Adjust for best performance' (value 2)
actions.name: VisualFXSetting

actions._comment: Disable Windows Search indexing for faster disk I/O (may slow file searches)
Disable Windows Update automatic restart scheduling
actions.name: UxOption

actions._comment: Disable Windows Defender real-time scanning (use with caution - security risk)
actions.name: DisableRealtimeMonitoring
